docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY HUSSEIN, ELSIE R. AS TO DEFENDANT JIM'S & DJS AUTOMOTIVE SERVICES AUTO BODY REPAIRS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S DECL; DID NOT GET TO SERVE DEFT. DUE TO COURT DATE. WOULD LIKE TO SERVE CERTIFIED MAIL WITH NEW COURT DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-09-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-11-1999 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO JIM ENG, OWNER JIME & DJS AUTOMOTIVE SERVICE RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN, ELSIE R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JIM'S & DJS AUTOMOTIVE SERVICES AUTO BODY REPAIRS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
